para_trans: Regarding the recognition of the Gyanjyothi Savitribai Phule Award for the year 2023-24 and 2024-95.
Government of Maharashtra
Department of Higher and Technical Education
Government Decision No: Sankauran-2026 / Q. No. 61/6. No. 1593779 / Masi-2
Madam Cama Marg, Martyrdom Rajguru Chowk,
Mantralaya, Mumbai - 400 032.
Date: 13th March, 2026

Reference: 9) Government Decisions, Department of Higher and Technical Education No. SAPUPU-2011 / (148/11) Coordination, D. 15.12.2011 2) Government Decisions, Department of Higher and Technical Education No. Safupu 2024 / P.No.12 / 7168 45 / Mashi-2, D. 02.02.2024 3) Letter from the Director, Higher Education, Pune No. Pillow / Cleanup / Application Scrutiny Meeting / Process - 3/2025/2106761, D. 19.03.2026
The Proposal: -
Reference No. 1 Gyanjyoti Savitribai Phule Award Scheme implemented by Government of India
Reference No. 2 Reorganization of the Scrutiny Committee to select the awardees under the Government Decision hereunder.
has been done. Reference No. 3 by the Director of Higher Education, Pune, vide letter No.
2024-25 Report of the Scrutiny Committee for the presentation of this year's awards Government-level selection
submitted to the committee. Accordingly, the matter of sanctioning the award
It was under the consideration of the government.
The Government's Decisions:
The Government is approving the conferment of Gyanjyothi Savitribai Phule Award for the year 2023-24 and 2024-25 one from each Revenue Department as indicated in the following statement.
Awardees during the year 2023-24
Awardees during the year 2024-25
2. Proceedings for presentation of awards by holding ceremony for presentation of awards.
Director, Higher Education, Maharashtra State, Pune.
